chunks.page_summary: This page presents a units translation table mapping numerical indices to various unit displays for Rheonics field devices.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863
Units Translation Table for Field devices
Modified on: Tue, 20 May, 2025 at 6:12 PM

Each parameter has a unit. Use the table below to translate the number to the corresponding unit.

Table 1. Units Translation Table
Unit Index | Unit Display
0          |
1          | mPa.s
2          | cP
3          | Pa.s
4          | Poise
5          | Reyn
6          | mm²/s
7          | cSt
8          | St
9          | m²/s
10         | in²/s
11         | SUS
12         | VI
13         | AV
14         | PV
15         | YP
16         | sec
17         | µ
18         | η
key_facts: This document provides a units translation table for Field devices.
The table maps a 'Unit Index' from 0 to 18 to a 'Unit Display'.
The document was last modified on Tuesday, May 20, 2025, at 6:12 PM.
The contact phone number provided is +1 713 234 0863.

key_facts: The document provides a comprehensive list of unit indices from 19 to 44.
Each unit index corresponds to a specific unit display symbol, covering various physical measurements.

Units for temperature (°C, °F, °K), density (g/cc, Kg/m³, lb/ft³, lbm/gal, lbs/gal, ppg, pptf, slug/ft³, SG, ρ, °API, °Baumé, °Brix), concentration (%wt/v, %v/v, %vol), pressure (Bar, psi), and flow rate (m³/s, sccm, gpm) are listed.
